inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the excavation or fill area (meters)

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the excavation or fill area (meters)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de la zone d'excavation ou de remblai (mètres)
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud del área de excavación o relleno (metros)

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the excavation or fill area (meters)

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the excavation or fill area (meters)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la zone d'excavation ou de remblai (mètres)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho del área de excavación o relleno (metros)

inputs.label: Depth
inputs.businessContext: Depth of soil to be moved (meters)

businessContext_i18n.en: Depth of soil to be moved (meters)

inputs.label: Soil Density
inputs.businessContext: Average bulk density of the soil (tonnes per cubic meter, typically 1.2-2.0)

businessContext_i18n.en: Average bulk density of the soil (tonnes per cubic meter, typically 1.2-2.0)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toprağın ortalama yığın yoğunluğu (ton/metreküp, tipik olarak 1.2-2.0)
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Schüttdichte des Bodens (Tonnen pro Kubikmeter, typischerweise 1,2–2,0)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Densité apparente moyenne du sol (tonnes par mètre cube, généralement 1,2-2,0)
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad aparente promedio del suelo (toneladas por metro cúbico, típicamente 1,2-2,0)

inputs.label: Swell / Compaction Factor
inputs.businessContext: Factor accounting for soil swell after excavation or compaction requirement (1.0 = no change, >1 for extra volume needed)

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor accounting for soil swell after excavation or compaction requirement (1.0 = no change, >1 for extra volume needed)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazı sonrası toprak kabarması veya sıkıştırma gereksinimini hesaba katan faktör (1.0 = değişiklik yok, >1 ek hacim gerektiğinde)
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor, der die Bodenauflockerung nach Aushub oder Verdichtungsanforderung berücksichtigt (1,0 = keine Änderung, >1 für zusätzliches Volumen erforderlich)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur tenant compte du foisonnement du sol après excavation ou de l'exigence de compactage (1,0 = aucun changement, >1 pour un volume supplémentaire nécessaire)
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor que considera el esponjamiento del suelo después de la excavación o el requisito de compactación (1,0 = sin cambio, >1 para volumen adicional necesario)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
